seoDescription: GenFix supports heavy industry, infrastructure, and commercial facilities with dependable power solutions.

hero.heading: About GenFix
hero.body: GenFix supports heavy industry, infrastructure, and commercial facilities with dependable power solutions.

sections.title: About GenFix Overview
sections.body: GenFix delivers practical equipment and support programs aligned to industrial uptime, safety, and project outcomes.

cards.title: Scope Planning
cards.description: Define requirements, load profiles, and site constraints before mobilisation.

cards.title: Delivery Model
cards.description: Flexible purchase and diesel generator rental options for 5-20 kVA site needs.

cards.title: Operational Support
cards.description: Monitoring, maintenance, and response services to keep critical loads online.

sections.title: How We Deliver
sections.body: Our teams combine engineering, field service, and nationwide logistics to deploy rapidly and reliably.

cards.title: Engineering
cards.description: In-house experts shape dependable system architecture for each project phase.

cards.title: Commissioning
cards.description: Structured testing and handover with clear operational documentation.

cards.title: Continuous Improvement
cards.description: Performance reviews and optimization backed by real operating data.
